conversation.message: How have things been for you lately?

It's been tough. I used to be able to go to the gym three times a week, but I haven't been since January. I just don't have the energy. It's not just the walking, it's the getting up in the morning too.
I'm not sleeping much. Maybe four or five hours a night. I wake up in the middle of the night and can't get back to sleep. It's like my brain is just racing or something.
Been doing anything you enjoy lately?
Not really. I used to love reading, but I just can't focus on a book anymore. I get a few pages in and then I just put it down. It's like my mind isn't working the way it used to.
